xterm.js
========

In-browser terminal emulator. Used by the vm-tab page to render the
WebVM's PTY as a real terminal (cursor positioning, ANSI colors,
scrollback, copy-paste).

Upstream
--------
Project:   https://xtermjs.org/
Source:    https://github.com/xtermjs/xterm.js
Package:   @xterm/xterm (formerly `xterm` on npm)
CDN base:  https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/

Pinned versions
---------------
@xterm/xterm:      5.5.0
@xterm/addon-fit:  0.10.0

xterm.js sha256:      1f991ac3b4b283ebf96e60ae23a00a52765dd3a2e46fa6fdda9f1aab032f7495
addon-fit.js sha256:  bdaefa370b1bfc42ee88d46fe6072400902a4d4b2d45cd93438dda9b23c97089

Vendored files
--------------
  xterm.js       UMD bundle (~290 KB) — exposes Terminal on globalThis
  xterm.css      stylesheet for the renderer's canvas + scrollbar
  addon-fit.js   FitAddon — sizes the terminal to its container

Loading model
-------------
The vm-tab page loads these as classic scripts in its index.html, so
they attach Terminal/FitAddon to globalThis before the vm-tab.js ESM
module runs.

License
-------
MIT.

Updating
--------
1. Bump XTERM_VERSION and/or ADDON_FIT_VERSION in scripts/vendor-xterm.sh
2. Run scripts/vendor-xterm.sh from the repo root
3. Update this file's version + sha lines
4. Smoke test by opening a VM tab (chip → + Create new WebVM)
